description: Assign properties to geogrid elements in the range. The properties consist of constitutive model properties, shell-type properties, and coupling-spring properties. The constitutive model property names are primary keywords, but are not included in the list above. The following properties are available, with the constitutive model properties listed first.

6.0.description: Assigns a property to elements in the range. The element can have isotropic, orthotropic, or anisotropic elastic material properties. The following properties are available:

keywords.name: density
keywords.description: density (needed if dynamic mode or gravity is active)

keywords.name: thickness
keywords.description: geogrid thickness

keywords.name: thermal-expansion
keywords.description: thermal expansion coefficient

keywords.name: anisotropic-membrane
keywords.syntax: anisotropic-membrane f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6
keywords.description: anisotropic membrane material properties {cʹ11, cʹ12, cʹ13, cʹ22, cʹ23, cʹ33} [F/L2], which define membrane material-stiffness matrices [Eʹm] and [Eʹb], respectively, in the material directions x’, y’, z’.

keywords.name: anisotropic-bending
keywords.syntax: anisotropic-bending f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6
keywords.description: anisotropic bending material properties {cʹ11, cʹ12, cʹ13, cʹ22, cʹ23, cʹ33} [F/L2], which define bending material-stiffness matrices [Eʹm] and [Eʹb], respectively, in the material directions x’, y’, z’.

keywords.name: anisotropic-both
keywords.syntax: anisotropic-both f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6
keywords.description: anisotropic membrane and bending material properties {cʹ11, cʹ12, cʹ13, cʹ22, cʹ23, cʹ33} [F/L2], which define membrane and bending material-stiffness matrices [Eʹm] and [ Eʹb ], respectively, in the material directions x’, y’, z’.

keywords.name: material-x
keywords.description: specify the vector v whose projection onto the geogrid surface defines the x’-axis of the material coordinate system. The material directions correspond with the principal directions of orthotropy (for more information, see below).

keywords.name: isotropic
keywords.description: isotropic material properties: E and v where E is Young’s modulus [F/L2] and v is Poisson’s ratio

keywords.name: orthotropic-membrane
keywords.description: orthotropic membrane material properties {cʹ11, cʹ12, cʹ22, cʹ33} [F/L2], which define membrane material-stiffness matrices [Eʹm] and [Eʹb], respectively, in the material directions x’, y’, z’.

keywords.name: orthotropic-bending
keywords.description: orthotropic bending material properties {cʹ11, cʹ12, cʹ22, cʹ33} [F/L2], which define bending material-stiffness matrices [Eʹ m] and [Eʹb], respectively, in the material directions x’, y’, z’.

keywords.name: orthotropic-both
keywords.description: orthotropic membrane and bending material properties {cʹ11, cʹ12, cʹ22, cʹ33} [F/L2], which define membrane and bending material-stiffness matrices [Eʹm] and [Eʹb], respectively, in the material directions x’, y’, z’.

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-shear
keywords.description: coupling spring cohesion (stress units)

keywords.name: coupling-friction-shear
keywords.description: coupling spring friction angle (degrees)

keywords.name: coupling-stiffness-shear
keywords.description: coupling spring stiffness per unit area

keywords.name: slide
keywords.description: large-strain sliding flag

keywords.name: slide-tolerance
keywords.description: large-strain sliding tolerance

7.0.description: Assigns a property to elements in the range. The element can have isotropic, orthotropic, or anisotropic elastic material properties. The following properties are available:

keywords.name: density
keywords.description: density (needed if dynamic mode or gravity is active)

keywords.name: thickness
keywords.description: geogrid thickness

keywords.name: thermal-expansion
keywords.description: thermal expansion coefficient

keywords.name: anisotropic-membrane
keywords.syntax: anisotropic-membrane f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6
keywords.description: anisotropic membrane material properties {\(c^{\prime}_{11}, c^{\prime}_{12}, c^{\prime}_{13}, c^{\prime}_{22}, c^{\prime}_{23}, c^{\prime}_{33}\)} \([F/L^2]\), which define membrane material-stiffness matrices \([Eʹ_m]\) and \([Eʹ_b]\), respectively, in the material directions \(x'\), \(y'\), \(z'\).

keywords.name: anisotropic-bending
keywords.syntax: anisotropic-bending f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6
keywords.description: anisotropic bending material properties {\(c^{\prime}_{11}, c^{\prime}_{12}, c^{\prime}_{13}, c^{\prime}_{22}, c^{\prime}_{23}, c^{\prime}_{33}\)} \([F/L^2]\), which define bending material-stiffness matrices \([Eʹ_m]\) and \([Eʹ_b]\), respectively, in the material directions \(x'\), \(y'\), \(z'\).

keywords.name: material-x
keywords.description: specify the vector v whose projection onto the geogrid surface defines the \(x'\)-axis of the material coordinate system. The material directions correspond with the principal directions of orthotropy (for more information, see below).

keywords.name: isotropic
keywords.description: isotropic material properties: \(E\) and \(v\) where \(E\) is Young’s modulus \([F/L^2]\) and \(v\) is Poisson’s ratio

keywords.name: orthotropic-membrane
keywords.description: orthotropic membrane material properties {\(c^{\prime}_{11}, c^{\prime}_{12}, c^{\prime}_{22}, c^{\prime}_{33}\)} \([F/L^2]\), which define membrane material-stiffness matrices \([Eʹ_m]\) and \([Eʹ_b]\), respectively, in the material directions \(x'\), \(y'\), \(z'\).

keywords.name: orthotropic-bending
keywords.description: orthotropic bending material properties {\(c^{\prime}_{11}, c^{\prime}_{12}, c^{\prime}_{22}, c^{\prime}_{33}\)} \([F/L^2]\), which define bending material-stiffness matrices \([Eʹ_m]\) and \([Eʹ_b]\), respectively, in the material directions \(x'\), \(y'\), \(z'\).

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion
keywords.description: coupling spring cohesion (stress units)

keywords.name: coupling-friction
keywords.description: coupling spring friction angle (degrees)

keywords.name: coupling-stiffness
keywords.description: coupling spring stiffness per unit area

keywords.name: slide
keywords.description: large-strain sliding flag

keywords.name: slide-tolerance
keywords.description: large-strain sliding tolerance
